title: scutellaria polyphylla
intro: Scutellaria polyphylla, also known as the Chinese skullcap or multiflowered skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria polyphylla include reducing inflammation and fever, relieving pain and anxiety, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
